amb.faq.aadhaarSafe.a: Yes. Aadhaar is used only to verify identity and is never stored in full — only masked/last digits are kept, encrypted. It is never shared with buyers.
amb.faq.bankAccount.a: Money is paid straight to the farmer's own bank account via UPI — no cash handling, no middleman. A bank account is how the farmer receives their sale money safely.
amb.faq.buyerNoPay.a: The buyer pays into escrow before dispatch. The farmer's money is held safely and released after delivery is confirmed — so a buyer cannot take goods without paying.
amb.faq.mandiCashDigital.a: Mandi cash can mean lower prices, weighing disputes and travel. Selling digitally reaches more buyers, keeps a record, and pays directly to the bank — often at a better price.
amb.faq.moneyAfterSelling.a: Money goes directly to the farmer's bank account via UPI within 24 hours of the buyer confirming delivery. No cash, no middleman. The farmer sees the status in their wallet.
amb.faq.moneyAfterSelling.q: How do I get my money after selling?
amb.faq.moneyAfterSelling.script: Money comes straight to your bank · within 24 hours
amb.faq.noInternet.a: The app works offline — the farmer can create a listing without signal and it uploads automatically when the network returns. Nothing is lost in the field.
amb.faq.noInternet.q: What if my phone has no internet?
amb.faq.platformFee.a: The platform fee covers escrow, secure payments, buyer discovery and support. The exact fee for a sale is always shown before the farmer confirms — nothing is hidden.
amb.faq.platformFee.q: Why is there a platform fee?
amb.faq.sellWithoutListing.a: No — a listing is what lets buyers find and bid on the produce. Creating one takes a minute with photos and voice, and it can be reused.
amb.faq.title: FAQ Cheat Sheet

workerHelp.title: Help & Support
workerHelp.comingSoon: This is coming soon. For now, use "Report wage issue" or the helpline.
workerHelp.reportConfirm: We'll raise a priority request for our support team to look into your wage issue and follow up with the employer on your behalf.
workerHelp.reportedBody: Our support team will look into it and get back to you.
workerHelp.q.payTiming.q: When will I get paid after finishing work?
workerHelp.q.payTiming.a: Wages are released within 24 hours of your check-out, once the employer confirms your hours. If it's overdue, use "Report wage issue".
workerHelp.q.lessWage.q: What if farmer pays less than agreed?
workerHelp.q.lessWage.a: You are owed the wage agreed on the booking. Tap "Report wage issue" — our team follows up with the employer on your behalf.
workerHelp.q.cancelJob.q: Can I cancel a booked job?
workerHelp.q.cancelJob.a: Yes. Cancel as early as you can from your jobs list so the employer can find someone else. Repeated last-minute cancellations can affect your rating.
workerHelp.q.pmsby.a: PMSBY is a government accident-insurance cover of ₹2 lakh. See the Insurance section in your profile for your status and how to enrol.
workerHelp.q.minWage.q: What is the minimum wage in Gujarat?
workerHelp.q.minWage.a: The state sets a statutory minimum daily wage. No booking on the platform may offer below the applicable minimum for the work.
workerHelp.q.multipleFarmers.q: Can I work for multiple farmers same week?
workerHelp.q.multipleFarmers.a: Yes. You can accept jobs from any employer as long as the dates don't clash. Keep your availability updated so you only get offers you can take.
